runtime_env_vars.evidence: MuJoCo headless rendering: OSMesa for offscreen rendering in headless container (dm_control/mujoco requirement)
dm_control requires PYOPENGL_PLATFORM=osmesa for headless offscreen rendering

readme_quotes:
conda create -n aloha python=3.8.10
conda activate aloha
pip install torchvision
pip install torch
pip install mujoco==2.3.7
pip install dm_control==1.0.14
ambiguities: README uses conda + pip install steps; translated to uv sync --frozen with pyproject.toml/uv.lock which already encodes all pins including torch==2.0.0+cu118, mujoco==2.3.3, dm_control==1.0.9 and the detr workspace member.
needs_render_libs quirk (libegl1/libosmesa6): auto-injected apt_install step; MUJOCO_GL=osmesa + PYOPENGL_PLATFORM=osmesa added as runtime_env_vars for headless rendering.
README mentions python=3.8.10 but pyproject.toml requires-python = >=3.9,<3.10; using 3.9 per pyproject.toml.
detr is a uv workspace member; uv sync --frozen --no-install-project --no-install-workspace installs deps; editable install of act+detr happens in entrypoint.sh at container start.
